* Issues: A player from Azerbaijan had their bonus voided due to a discrepancy in the bonus expiration time.  The casino support informed the player the bonus expired at 0:00 (GMT+2), but it was voided at 0:14 GMT. The player's complaint was rejected because the casino's terms and conditions prevailed over the live chat information. [SOURCE: casino.guru | 2024-06-18 | Player Complaint]
